content:
Hey Mike!
Hope all is going well!
I’m just graduating from my MFA program in writing this summer. I’m trying to submit some screenplays to some contests and also would love some advice on how to get some work in Los Angeles.
One of the contests rules is to have a letter of recommendation, so I’m sending a long a script and when you have some time and could take a glance at it if you think its worthy, maybe you can write me a letter of recommendation. I’m also just looking for feedback on wether you think its good or now.
Best,
Anthony Padavano

Silent teenager sets out on a surreal journey to discover the muder of he….
context: From document: A teenage dog-walker sets out on a dark and surreal journey to discover… — chunk 2 (chunk 2/2)
